description: A great addition to your audit tool suite and invaluable in organizing your work.
author: Clint V.
pros: I like the account mapping feature especially, and love the fact that it can be rolled from one audit to the next (YOY).
cons: It can be confusing to learn at the start, and it's useful to attend training or have someone show you how the tool works

description: Early days so far but on demonstration of the product, it has all we need, also other Caseware products such as IXBRL tagging, Companies House E-filing
author: Sumeet D.
pros: Affordability against other products, customer service, brand reputation as market leader, client base
cons: No cloud option for storage, updates a little manual vs other similar products such as Onesource
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Darren H.
pros: Great as a repository for documents. Not great as audit software.
cons: CaseWare does not feel very intuitive. It's a little clunky as it is refreshing.

description: The features help me better to understand audit requirements and steps to follow during the course of the audit.
author: Hakeem L.
pros: CaseWare makes audit working papers to be less complex. It aids the audit engagements to go smoothly with proper audit records keeping.
cons: The software needs to improve in speed better than the existing speed.

description: I have never really had training in completing and performing tax computations and tax returns other than in my studies. I have always had to learn through trial and error. Before using tax module, i may have known how to do corporate income tax but I never really understood certain rules and where things go without double checking. This all changed when I started using the tax module as it provides an adaptable platform which shows exactly where and how things make their way into the tax calculation. At first, it's quitetime consuming but once you get the hang of it, you'll never go back to your old system. Instead of sitting for hours in training or worst case scenario, following previous years as guidelines to figure out where everything goes in the tax return, you are able to identify what goes where and why. It has also assisted with turning 3 processes into 1. Everything can be done through the tax module and be exported to eFiling and your operating system.
author: Jodi M.
pros: Useful learning platform for accountants in training. Turns three processes into one.
cons: Everything needs to be 100% accurate before exporting. Time consuming at first.

review_title: Excellent Tool that helps audit teams
author: Luz D.
pros: Is a good tool to allow auditors to make sample selections. It is user friendly once you get the basics of it.
cons: It gets some getting used to it, but once you do, it is really easy to use again and again.

description: Assisted and streamlined all audit projects and allowed for accountability of all team members through signature sign offs.
author: Zaakiya Z.
pros: The fact that working papers and audit procedures were custom made to the audit firm requirements as well as all the functionalities such as caseview work plans prompting specific testing to be done before sign off.
cons: Glitches in certain documents and the layout not being user friendly such as the FSA and other caseview documents.

review_title: Great tool for small public practice firms.
description: I worked in 2 big 4 companies and 1 small public practice firm and think that it was a really great and smart tool that makes financial statement prep, NTRs, reviews and audits more organized.
author: Grace T.
pros: That it’s a great way to organize file and its adaptable. I love how leadsheets can be linked to the working papers easily and that there are ways to map the trial balance and financial statements to make your life easier.
cons: That you can’t open two engagements at the same time to compare files. That the grunt work at the beginning for creating linked FS or mapping accounts requires a bit of know how.

review_title: This software is very easy to use, permits to the users operate without problem.
author: Isabel M.
pros: This analyzing tool permits import various types of files and extract data with very easily. It is possible import different types of files and extract specific data based on parameters.
cons: This software lacks some features compared to others. In addition, it takes a long time to learn how to handle it. You have multiple licenses.

author: Anita Ž.
pros: The software is easy to use and simple to get use to. It is somewhat simillar to Excel.
cons: I noticed a small mathematical error in counts, but I haven't used it long enough to find anythung big.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Procesamiento en grande y trazabilidad de las consultas para auditoria
description: Análisis de información, cruces de información de archivos de tamaño mayor a 5 GB, consultas rápidas aun cuando el equipo no tenga una buena configuración. Opera con menos recursos que los que se recomienda por el fabricante.
author: Ricardo G.
pros: La capacidad para procesar archivos, permite trabajar con archivos de mas de 15 millones de registros, procesamiento rápido, las carpetas creadas para almacenar la información, facilidad para crear la consultas. Herramienta para personas no expertas en sistemas de información. La generación de estadísticas de cada archivo.
cons: La forma en que crecen exponencialmente los archivos a medida que se hacen consultas y a veces el tamaño de los archivos después de múltiples consultas no permite leerlo. Los ejemplos de la ayuda no son claros para quien quiere utilizar formulas.

description: CaseWare Cloud offers a user-friendly interface, making navigating and generating financial statements easy. It is better software for audit and accounting firms to compile the financial information and prepare the financial statement as required by CPA Canada. We don't have to worry about anything if we are able to input the correct trial balance.
author: Baburam B.
pros: The cloud version is elementary and straightforward. I used the desktop version earlier, but it was very easy to navigate the software and data after we switched to the cloud version. I also worked to get financial statements from the provided trial balance and other information.
cons: There is no such thing that disappoints me about caseware cloud.

review_title: CaseWare Working Papers is the best software for drafting annual financial statements
description: CaseWare Working Papers is an excellent piece of audit software, and it is ideal for drafting annual financial statements for clients. As long as Working Papers are kept up to date with the latest patches and software updates available, the annual financial statements will be in compliance will all relevant accounting standards and legislation. For example, recently in South Africa, the company tax rate was updated from 28% to 27% (in the past year, February). Since updating to the latest version of CaseWare Working Papers, all templates have been updated to incorporate this change in tax legislation. I don't have to stress about compliance issues, as Working Papers stays up to date with all the latest changes.
author: Maureen P.
pros: Throughout my 3 years of audit articles, I used CaseWare Working Papers to perform audits (documentation of all audit work performed was done in Working Papers) and draft annual financial statements. In my current role, Working Papers are mostly used for just drafting of the annual financial statements for clients. I enjoy using CaseWare Working Papers to draft financial statements, because all relevant standards are available, and templates can be easily loaded into the program when needed. In addition, annual financial statements can be entirely customized according to client preference, while taking into consideration compliance with the relevant standards.
cons: There are no issues that are noteworthy. It is just a pity that CaseWare Working Papers cannot be 100% integrated into my own audit firm's in-house developed audit software. Other than that, CaseWare Working Papers is a very good audit software.

description: Overall the software is great because it has been developed with the end user in mind. If I were to choose between IDEA and other auditing and data analytics software I would prefer IDEA because it offers a comprehensive set of features for data audits.
author: Ivan V.
pros: First off, the documentation of the software is comprehensive and clear. Secondly the software allows auditors to work on the host locally as well as using a server, allowing entire teams to share data together. Finally the software supports an extensive list of data formats, from XML to different kind of database formats and as a bonus it has scripting options.
cons: When working with a remote server, the software tends to lock up during data load. This ensures the integrity of the data, but it's makes the user feel as if the software is unresponsive.

review_title: Nova geração de Software de Análise de Dados !
description: Fabuloso ! O ideal para processo de auditoria contínua através de scripts em VBA agregados a subsrotinas Python. Possui agendador própio de execuçaõ de Scrips e roda em ambiente de 64 bits.
author: Mauro S.
pros: Facilidade de Uso , Versão 64 bit, Integra com outros produtos da CaseWare e cada licença susbscrita recebe espaço para uso da Nuvem Cloud Share, 100% Colaborativo e de rapido aprendizado. Possui interface bi-direciona para utilização com rotinas escritas em linguagem Python O IDEA permite acesso Remoto. As empresas que requerem processamento central de suas informações, agora podem através de uma rede provada VPA, execeutar seus trabalhos em REMOTE ACCESS com a máxima segurança
cons: O software possui praticamente todos os recursos necessários para serem utilizados em Data Analytics. Não existe uma ainda versão lite que permite selecional apenas uma parte dos recursos do aplicativo.

author: Zolani P.
pros: It made preparation of financials seamless. Eliminated common errors and improved the standard of the financials including IFRS updates.
cons: Not an easy software to teach first timers. One needs an environment where they will use the software on a daily basis to grasp the concepts.

review_title: Very handy but sometimes hard to use
description: Good overall experience, very helpful. Take a minute to get the hang of it but very pleased with the software.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love the functions of this software, helps me cut the time it takes to do my accounting processes in half. Makes my job much easier!
cons: The functionality could be improved upon. Some features are hard to use and the software is subject to freezing and crashing.

review_title: Definitely get training so you know ALL the features!
description: Great customer service, licensing can be a bit cumbersome, but overall, a very user friendly and workable tool for any audit or financial analysis need.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Highly granular functions, amazing array of pre-made tests, fast and efficient, great automation.
cons: Needs buttons for functions, writing them can be complex. Training really helps with this!

description: We have been able to audit items that would not have been able to be done any other way and it has greatly improved our ability to complete certain tasks. Besides the need for training to use the software and the training available being horrible, it is a useful product.
author: Kelli M.
pros: It provides the ablility to compare two large data sets relatively easily.
cons: I have been using and testing software for about 25 years and this is least intuitive software I have every seen. It is buggy to change connections or setup connections especially with ORACLE databases. We paid for users to be trained and the training was terrible. It was a waste of money to pay for employees to travel and sit in a training for a week and the teacher was horrible. It was a huge disappointment and no one at the company seemed to care. This instructor had a reputation of being terrible according to others in the class with our employees.

author: Tariro G.
pros: my worf low is greatly enhanced since I started using this software. It really makes everything simpler and much more efficient. Also they have great customer service.
cons: I have found that the update process does tend to take a while.

review_title: The most essential software for accountants
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I could not imagine by workflow without this software. It has simplified and streamlined my entire workflow, increase efficiency and billings.
cons: The update process is till burdensome and feels like data may be lost.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I use this software as a corporate tax accountant. It helps greatly with data analysis in areas such as revenue and inventory and creates streamlined final accounts and returns.
cons: Because of the amount of data stored the software can be slow to respond and update. Errors can also take a long time for their internal team to fix.

review_title: A diversified and handy tool to play with data
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Very easy to use and full of functionalities that you can have at this budget. I specially liked the interface, it allows the users to operate smoothly from the very beginning.
cons: Some functionalities are missing compared to other high end softwares. But considering their cost it ok to let go of them.

review_title: Useful for financial and audit analytics
description: Great application for extracting data and using it as an analysis tool.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This software has very useful features to analyze data. I love how easy it is to import and export data.
cons: I found it confusing to use at first and takes a while to learn how to use it well. Other than that I have found no other issues.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
